sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nuntakna khomun kei, Hong pia’n Topa;
Galilee tuili gei, na hih bangmah;
Nangmah tak ka lungdeih hinna thu aw.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khomun na piak bang zia’n, Na thupha tawh

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kei a’ ding Topa Nang, Nuntak khomun
Hong it sakin thuman, Itna na

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa aw, Kha Siangtho, Kei hong puak in,
Keima mit khua mu lo, Vak sak
Hong telsak ding; Na thu sung pan Nang,
